prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 2991→2918→2292→1986→1330，整体呈明显前移趋势（竞争加剧），近 3 年累计前移约 960 名，2025 年较 2024 年大幅前移 656 名，基准位次约 1330 名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划 2021–2024 年均为 50 人，2025 年缩减至 40 人，2026 年进一步缩减至 34 人，较 2025 年缩招 15%，供给减少将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2021 年第 25 名→2025 年第 21 名→2026 年第 23 名，稳居全国顶尖工科院校前列；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），抖音热度排名第 74 位（一般），整体曝光度中等偏低，可能对报考热度有轻微抑制作用；航空宇航科学与技术 A+、计算机科学与技术 A+、材料科学与工程 A+、机械工程 A、控制科学与工程 A-、信息与通信工程 A-，共 7 个 A- 及以上学科，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐；辽宁省 2026 年考生总数约 20 万（与 2025 年基本持平），物理类考生估算约 14.36 万；省控线（物理类本科批）近 5 年稳定在 336–368 分之间，2025 年为 367 分，变化不大；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，非本省高校，无本地倾斜；该校在辽宁招生占比不高，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2021–2025 年位次持续前移的强势走势、2026 年缩招 15% 带来的竞争加剧，以及声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制热度，在 2025 年基准 1330 名基础上预计竞争仍将加剧但势头放缓；预测最低位次约 1230 名，区间 1045–1415 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（智慧三航拔尖班）
- 航空航天类（黄玉珊航空班）
- 计算机类（计算机）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 航空航天类（航天）
- 航空航天类（航空）

- 航空航天类（航空发动机）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 1045–1415 名内，建议以二档航空航天类（航天/航空）和电子信息类为主力填报，一档智慧三航拔尖班和黄玉珊航空班可冲刺，三档海洋工程班和自动化类作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1045 名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2991→2918→2292→1986→1330, showing a clear forward trend (intensified competition). In the past 3 years, the cumulative forward shift is about 960 places, and in 2025 compared to 2024, it moved forward significantly by 656 places, with a baseline ranking of about 1330. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 50 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 40 in 2025, and further reduced to 34 in 2026, a 15% reduction compared to 2025. The reduced supply will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was 25th in 2021 → 21st in 2025 → 23rd in 2026, firmly among the top engineering universities in China. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (campus safety incidents), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 74th (average), overall exposure moderately low, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Disciplines: Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, a total of 7 A- and above disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Liaoning Province is about 200,000 (roughly the same as 2025), with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 143,600. The provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has been stable between 336–368 points in the past 5 years, with 2025 at 367 points, showing little change. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university in the province, so there is no local preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is not high, and regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong forward trend in rankings from 2021 to 2025, the intensified competition due to a 15% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the slightly negative reputation that may mildly suppress enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 1330, competition is expected to continue intensifying but at a slower pace. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1230, with a range of 1045–1415.

- Computer (Computer).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1045–1415, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Aerospace (Space/Aviation) and Electronic Information as main choices, with Tier 1 Smart Three Aerospace Elite Class and Huang Yushan Aviation Class as reach options, and Tier 3 Ocean Engineering Class and Automation as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 1045), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年第 23 名，综合实力顶尖，但以理工科见长，文科专业非其核心优势；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），抖音热度一般，对文科考生报考意愿可能有轻微抑制；该校 A- 及以上学科均为工科，历史类招生专业（经济与贸易类、工商管理类、外国语言文学类）无直接对应的 A 级学科支撑。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次缓慢后移趋势、2026 年缩招 18.75% 加剧竞争，以及文科专业非该校优势、相关专业热度一般，在 2025 年基准 1528 名基础上预计竞争略有加剧但幅度有限；预测最低位次约 1371 名，区间 1165–1577 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1221→1299→1341→1492→1528, showing a slow backward trend overall (competition slightly eased). In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 187 places, with the 2025 baseline around 1528. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 16 students in 2024–2025, and reduced to 13 students in 2026, a decrease of 18.75% compared to 2025. The reduced supply will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with top comprehensive strength but strong in science and engineering, while liberal arts majors are not its core advantage. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (campus safety incidents), with average Douyin popularity, which may mildly suppress liberal arts students' willingness to apply. All A- and above disciplines are engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors (Economics and Trade, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature) have no directly corresponding A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics and Trade (Finance/Economics/Economy) is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see. The estimated number of History Category examinees in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 56,400 (basically the same as 2025). The provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) in 2025 was 437 points, which has rebounded compared to previous years. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university, and its liberal arts majors have relatively limited appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow backward trend of History Category rankings, the 18.75% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, and the fact that liberal arts majors are not the university's strength with average popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 1528, competition is expected to slightly intensify but to a limited extent. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1371, with a range of 1165–1577.
